creator: cs@FreeBSD.org
text:
I had a look again at the dependencies mentioned in DEPS.txt in the 
 source code. It mentions Python and py-twisted. Nevertheless, I do not 
 think that your patch is necessary, i.e. to add py-twisted to 
 RUN_DEPENDS. It is already mentioned in USE_TWISTED = yes. So, I think 
 my original patch was fine. What do you think? Did you have any errors 
 on Tinderbox?

 Carlo
